title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMEmergency
description: An emergency facility or equipment from OpenStreetMap tagged with emergency=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMEmergency

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

emergencyType.description: Property. The OSM emergency tag classifying the feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:emergency'

phoneNumber.description: Property. Contact phone number for the facility.

ref.description: Property. Internal reference number (e.g., hydrant number).

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
